title: TxShulkerboxTooltip
description: (lifestealsmp.com) Shows you shulkerbox contents when hovering over a shulkerbox in an inventory. Hold [configurable keybind] to lock tooltip & hover over individual items inside the shulkerbox all just from your inventory (or auction house, etc...).
body:
Very simple mod that shows shulkerbox contents when hovering over a shulkerbox in an inventory. 

Hold configurable keybind (defaults to CTRL) to lock tooltip & hover over individual items inside the shulkerbox for more details.

Works on all servers, which have features like auction house, shops, etc...).

(Holding CTRL while previewing a shulkerbox in auction house, so I can see all the enchants on boots.)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3affe0eb96a573d84bf287094edcd49c1973a2b.png)

Support server: discord.gg/lifestealsmp
